# h5auth

> Source: [https://www.showdoc.com.cn/PCWeixinHook/11559060626722638](https://www.showdoc.com.cn/PCWeixinHook/11559060626722638)  
> ShowDoc page_id: 11559060626722638

##### 简要描述

- 

##### 请求URL
- ` http://{{host}}:{{port}}/h5auth `
##### 请求方式
- POST

##### 发送示例

```
{
}
```

##### 发送说明

无参数



##### 返回示例
```
{
    "h5Session": "CAASDNufvGMQGZa2td+HyBoAIgAqdQALMzKUBAAAAQAAAAAAFYJ+5ZzqYfLxn/37wWkgAAAA1UGdBXXRK/g86uSCGsDBfuBITiH/f/+SD7AQwWXuy/qGt5secAs9l0mw91Q+Zvm0lSQif4Vh7KPz27sxc+bEmwUrvSDkwoDIcKrYCesceb8z7Nq74Q==",
    "ts": 1774327837,
    "unkToken": ""
}
```
